generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are actively undermining our civil defense preparedness? While we focus on building local resilience, certain foreign actors are exploiting our openness to weaken our national security. It's time to demand accountability from those who prioritize ideological agendas over our safety. #CivilDefense #NationalSecurity
